case_title: MCGEE, ODIEST vs. STURDIVANT, DIANNE et al

docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCGEE, ODIEST SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR NOV-17-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON NOV-23-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01
JUDGE WICK, BETH WILBER - CLERK, BRENDA FIELDS - REPORTER: C/C FOR SETT. CONF, ALL PARTIES PRESENT, CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STURDIVANT, DIANNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2100 POST ST, #17, STAYED UNTIL DEC-08-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT. VACATES TIMELY, PLTF. WAIVES BACK RENT & DAMAGES AND WILL PAY DEFT. $200.00 IN MOVING EXPENSES IN CASH; (SEE FILE FOR MORE DETAILS).
